archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) merged with Vibrant Data Accents

typography.instructions: Avoid Inter. Use Outfit for all headers for a modern corporate feel, and IBM Plex Sans for body/data clarity.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid for analytics. Dense, exact, and optimized for data scanning.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use Tailwind p-4, p-6. Avoid excessive padding in data tables. gap-4 between main widgets.
layout_and_spacing.structure: Single page fullscreen. Left Sidebar (flex-none, w-80 or w-96, h-screen, overflow-y-auto). Main Map (flex-1, h-screen, relative positioning).

components.map: React-Leaflet filling the main area. Use CartoDB Voyager tiles (bright/vibrant base). Overlay UI elements on the map (like Zoom controls, Draw Zone button) should have pure white backgrounds, subtle shadows, and crisp 1px borders.
components.draw_zone_button: Floating Action Button on the map. Use the active energy color (Solar/Wind/Combined) for its background. Use a vibrant gradient (e.g., bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-amber-600) and no transparent hover state.
components.sidebar: Strictly dark navy. Metric cards within the sidebar should use #1E293B background, rounded-lg, 1px border (#334155).
components.metric_cards: Include clear Data Points (Suitability %, Feasibility Score, Area ha, Annual GWh) styled with IBM Plex Sans. Use risk colors (Green/Amber/Red) for the Feasibility score.
components.layer_controls: Toggle buttons inside the sidebar. Active states must light up in the vibrant accent colors (Amber/Cyan/Emerald).
components.charts_and_data: If visualizing data, use Shadcn charts or simple progress bars colored by energy type.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Interactive elements lift (-translate-y-[1px]) or scale (scale-105). Sidebars and panels remain static.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for color and transform changes.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast. White text on vibrant buttons must be checked. Dark navy provides perfect contrast for light text.
accessibility.testing: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='solar-toggle', data-testid='draw-zone-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React with pure JavaScript (.js files), not TypeScript (.tsx).
Do NOT implement dark mode for the entire app. The main map and any overlays MUST be bright. Only the Left Sidebar should be dark navy (#0B1120).
Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' and configure them in Tailwind.
Use 'react-leaflet' and 'leaflet' for the map view. Include Leaflet CSS.
Implement an Energy Type Selector (Solar, Wind, Combined) which changes the active accent color across the dashboard.
Build a 'Draw Analysis Zone' button floating over the map.
In the Sidebar, implement the Layer Controls (toggles for Satellite, Solar Heatmap, Wind Speed, Land Cover) and the Analytics Panel (metrics).
Use standard Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to match the technical, high-contrast, vibrant aesthetic described.
Remember to attach 'data-testid' attributes to all inputs, buttons, toggles, and metric cards.
